records.ety: [L., fr. Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ fire. See Pyre.]

defs: A name given to a number of metallic minerals, sulphides of iron, copper, cobalt, nickel, and tin, of a white or yellowish color.
notes: ☞ The term was originally applied to the mineral pyrite, or iron pyrites, in allusion to its giving sparks when struck with steel.
